metadata.title: FlowDockr for Designers
metadata.description: Scope and pricing workflows tailored for freelance designers.

hero.title: Design projects need clear revision boundaries.
hero.description: Use Scope first to control rounds, then Pricing to package add-ons.

features.title: Designer risk map
features.description: Most frequent friction points in client design work.

items.title: Concept expansion after approval
items.description: Treat new directions as out-of-scope add-ons.

items.title: Unlimited polish loops
items.description: Limit rounds and define completion criteria.

items.title: Discount requests
items.description: Trade scope for price, not quality for price.

cta.title: Start with a revision policy before the next kickoff.
cta.description: This alone can reduce rework and protect margin.
